title: hearth.integration.error v1
description: Emitted by hearth-nbus when an external integration (MQTT, Zigbee2MQTT, LG WebOS, etc.) returns an error. Consumers use this to update health dashboards and trigger alerting.

integration.description: Name of the integration that produced the error (e.g. 'mqtt', 'zigbee2mqtt', 'lg_webos').

reason.description: Human-readable error description from the integration layer.

recoverable.description: True if the integration is expected to recover on its own (e.g. transient network blip); false if manual intervention is needed.
